title: Bounded Promise Workers, Origin Fairness, Failure Isolation, and Drain · Changed-Schema Lab
summary: An independent university archive receives a different publisher mix, unknown XML shape, validator state, tenant, async schedule, database condition, accessibility need, platform, and injected failure and transfers bounded promise workers, origin fairness, failure isolation, and drain into a changed origin-aware bounded async ingestion pool. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of origin-aware bounded async ingestion pool with automated and judgment evidence. Learner…
objectives: Derive global, origin, tenant, database, memory, queue, and event-loop budgets and enforce the tightest active limit.
Track queued, running, settling, canceled, failed, and completed jobs with exactly one owner and one terminal result.
Schedule per-origin work without monopolization while respecting per-publisher cadence and useful global throughput.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Ts Multiresource Budget
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab TypeScript team handles case 9740 during a cross-tenant privacy and cache audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove multiresource budgets, owned workers, origin fairness, rejection isolation, and drain; every external value must remain unknown until current runtime validation admits it; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Ts Multiresource Budget.
